subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath singled Himself out in eternity, distinguished Himself through grandeur and majesty, and sanctified Himself above whatsoever is mentioned in the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی توحد بالبقاء و تفرد بالعظمه و الکبریاء و تقدس عما ذکر فی ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @wisdom [hikmat], @praise and encouragement, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @unity; oneness of humanity
